message:
feat: thread AbortSignal through to primitive execution

Add optional AbortSignal parameter to Primitive.execute() and
PrimitiveRegistry.execute() interfaces. The exec primitive threads
signal into ExecOptions, and exec_command short-circuits on
pre-aborted signals or kills the child process when abort fires
mid-execution. Agent.run() now passes this.signal to primitive
execution calls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
